TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Poland, title = Poland, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Poland} }

S.FORM: Poland u Poland sa i labu nu Europe, itiza i 52 00 N, 20 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 312,685 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 304,255 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 8,430 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 38,523,261. kakalukan umah sa 48.20%, kilakilangan umah sa 30.60%, zumaay henay umah sa 21.20%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Warsaw . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 3 bulad 5 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Andrzej Duda, micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihca 8 bulad 6 demiad. likisi Poland a niyaduan idawtu ku maluayaway a tademaw tayda itida mueneng. nika, aydahay a Poland a binacadan u kakawsan nuheni sa namakayda i siyun nu ayawan pitu a lasubu nuitidaay a tademaw ci Sise-la a tademaw. 2003ŚĻī4śúą, . tusa a malebut idaw ku tulu (2003) a mihcaan sepatay a bulad, India Pakistan nina tatusaay a kanatal masasakamu patahekal tuni ka lingatu ani kasa kamuan , sabaw tu cacay a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku lima a demiad pasaluimengen nuheni mikuwan tuni kalpacaw. siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku enem (966) a mihcaan Maseke ise milayap tu kilisetukiw (tinsukiw) a kiwkay, u Poland mala kilisetu a sinciaan. nina aydaay a Poland katukuh aydaay a Ayelan palecaden nu kitakit a tinsukiw a kilac nu satalakaway a kanatal. sabaw tu tusa a se-ci malingatu, itepalay nu Sen-cen Roma ti-kuo anika icelang, Poland wan-kuo ahican caay piales tu Cuo-o Europe a lala' kiya haw, pasaida midiput tu Tun-o Euripe adidiay a Luo-se kunkuo , sisa masasu ada'tu micapi tu walu a lasubu a mihcaan itida i Tun-o Europe ani kasasuadaan. cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu a seci nu cuoye Mongolia pasaida i nutipan midebung tu Poland , Mongolia di-kuo debunga nuheni ku Cuo-ya Asia a kanatal atu Luo-se kun-kuo nikudan debungen nuheni ku Poland . , nika uyniyan u Mongolia itini i Europe a kitidaan misa ahebal tu tanengay a kitidaan, Leakenika malepacaw henay Poland atu tiwdun' maka subauay a mapulungay masakaputay a hitay hiyan nu Mongolia ahitay mamim apatayan. 1260ŚĻīšĽ£‚ÄĒ1280 . cacay a malebut tusa a lasubu enem a bataan (1260) a mihcaan - cacay a malebut tusa a lasubu walu a bataan (1280) a mihcaan demecen naca nu sasepatay a kanatal nu Cincen a kanatal misawacu, sisa nai'satu ku laheci nu Poland . 14šłĖÁīÄ, . cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat (14) saci, Poland atu Sensnluomadikuo alaw masasu kapah tu. nika Poland haymaw satu miliyas tu Cuo-o Europe , malatatengaay tu nu Tuo-o Europe a kanatal. 13ÔĹě14 . cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (13)- cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat (14) a seci Poland atu biyaw a kanatal Litaw-wan-ta-kun-kuo amelik patiden tu masakaputay a kanatal, nina tusaay a kanatal sawsawni itini i hunse malalaluma'an. sadikuday satu Poland Lithuania demecen nuheni ku masasuaday nu Cincehan kanatal. miliyas atu Mongolia a tademaw nika sasungaay, alan nuhani ku Mumkutadan a tademaw mala O-lu Europe a satabakiya nu kanatal. cacay a bataan idaw ku enem katukuh katukuh tu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu a seci, nina tatusaay a kanatal palacacayen nu heni tu Poland Lithuania a kanatal, sisa nikaydaan nuheni makaala tu tusa a lasubu a mihcaan ku sakapahay satalakaway a zutay, milihida tu waliyan ni palekalan a E'luosesahun kanatal kinapina a malepacaw. atu Ottoman kanatal a nikalepacawan itinisatu Poland Lithuania mala atu Spain a kanatal Sensnluomadikuo , Ottoman kanatal, malecad atu Europe nu sepatay a saicelangay nu kanatal. cacay a bataan idaw ku walu nikudan a seci, Poland Lithuania pulu nu kanatal kalamkam a malawcu, itini i Sensnluomadikuo a kanatal a Awtili a kanatal, Puluse wankuo atu Poland nu ada' nuheni tu Russia kanatal nu tuluway a kanatal kina tulu kunuheni mibenis sisa malawpes satu kiya kanatal . namakayda malingatu nu tusaay a lasubu a mihcaan Cuo-Poland haymaw sa malawpes, haymaw satu liyawliyawsa a laecus. cacay a malebut enem a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku tulu (1683) a mihcaan, Poland kuowan ladayen nuheni ku hitay midebung amilepacaw tu Awtili nu Tueci a hitay, midiput tu O-cuo Europe anikakapah, pangangan han tu Wiyena ani kalepacaw han. cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa a seci, ci Napoleon ese mademec nikalepacaw satu, Poland nu hatidaay tu a lala' nu Russia kanatal Sahun a lala, nika Russia a kanatal kina cacayan a bataan a bulad a malepacaw. Poland itinitu i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (1918 ) a mihcaan cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay a bulad misiteked tu kunuheni, patideng tu pulung nu kanatal, isulit nu likisi Poland u sakatusa a pulung nu kanatal. sakaudip cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa a mihcaan (1989) nu nikudan, Poland nu Soviet lekec a awayway nu kiyaku a sakaudip pasaida i iciba nunipi sumad, GDP itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tulu (1993) a mihcaan katukuh tu tusa a malebut (2000) a mihcaan macunus kunika tanayuan mucelak. nika katukuh tu tusa a malebut idaw ku cacay (2001) a mihcaan kanatal adidi kumi cakaya tu cancanan mawada' atu kitakit nu sakaudip cacelakan mahaymaw ku kangdahan, Poland nu sakaudip anika cunus nikatanayu haymaw satu caaycelak. milihida satu Europe a malasacabayay , sakaudip nuheni kalamkam satu mucelak a kapah. Poland nami siteked satu, namakay i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan mapalekal masumad, micidak i tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay (21) a saci nuayawan nu pina a mihcaan, Poland itini i Europe sakae'timan han kaadihan tu nu katuuday, sisa alaw a mala Europe a malasacabayay un sakalalima a sakasiidaay. sasinguan nu Poland Poland 87.5 a kilac a tademaw u tinsukiw ku yadahay, duma satu nu lima a kilacan (5%) a tademaw u Orthodox a kiwkay atu kilisetu a baluhay nu kiwkayan. ayda han adiditu ku mitesekay tu tinsukiw a lalay nu lisin. amica kunisulitan tu ilikisi nadebungan nu Poland a Puluse atu Russia manglay mipenec tu tinsukiw, nika icelang ku sinku nu Poland a tademaw misuayaw tu tinsukiw. i-su' Poland ni sikian tu aadihan itini i kanatal mamelawan nu katuuday nu singanganay, itini i suotu Warsaw idawku nu kitakitay a sayaway nu bayu a sinbung nipatideng a puowkun . itini i tusa (20) a seci lima a bataan (50) a ziday, itini i kuncen anikuwanan, sifu misuayaw tu nalimaan ansangaan anipikawan misaadidi'aca', u sibung hantu mala pakunida sananay a sasakamuen nu kakawaw. katukuh tu sabaw tu tusa a seci, Poland anipatidengan a kacudu nu singbung ka ngada han nu katuuday, sakatinengan u " misakainai' tu kulit atu micidekay a kulit, alesen nuheni ku amisay a nalimaan a dadan".

ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu nanumaj sa *,*** km*. ńßamin nu tad…ômaw sa **,***,***. kakar~…ĺukan umańß sa **.**%, kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan umańß sa **.**%, zumaaj ńß…ônaj umańß sa **.**%. tapaŇč tusu nu kanatar~…ĺ u (****) nu nikudan, por~…ĺand nu so*i…ôt r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶ a awajwaj nu kijaku a sakaudip pasaida i i ¶iba nunipi sumad, gdp itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu (****) a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut (****) a mińß ¶aan ma ¶unus kunika tanajuan mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak. nika katukuńß tu tusa a mar~…ĺ…ôbut idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (****) a mińß ¶aan kanatar~…ĺ adidi kumi ¶akaja tu ¶an ¶anan mawada Ē~ ° atu kitakit nu sakaudip ¶a ¶…ôr~…ĺakan mańßajmaw ku kaŇčdańßan, por~…ĺand nu sakaudip anika ¶unus nikatanaju ńßajmaw satu ¶aaj ¶…ôr~…ĺak. mir~…ĺińßida satu …ôurop…ô a mar~…ĺasa ¶abajaj , sakaudip nuńß…ôni kar~…ĺamkam satu mu ¶…ôr~…ĺak a kapańß. por~…ĺand nami sit…ôk…ôd satu, namakaj i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu siwa a bataan (****) a mińß ¶aan mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ masumad, mi ¶idak i tusa a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj (**) a sa ¶i nuajawan nu pina a mińß ¶aan, por~…ĺand itini i …ôurop…ô saka…ô Ē~ °timan ńßan kaadińßan tu nu katuudaj, sisa ar~…ĺaw a mar~…ĺa …ôurop…ô a mar~…ĺasa ¶abajaj un sakar~…ĺar~…ĺima a sakasiidaaj. sasiŇčuan nu por~…ĺand por~…ĺand **.* a kir~…ĺa ¶ a tad…ômaw u tinsukiw ku jadańßaj, duma satu nu r~…ĺima a kir~…ĺa ¶an (*%) a tad…ômaw u ortńßodo* a kiwkaj atu kir~…ĺis…ôtu a bar~…ĺuńßaj nu kiwkajan. ajda ńßan adiditu ku mit…ôs…ôkaj tu tinsukiw a r~…ĺar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺisin. ami ¶a kunisur~…ĺitan tu ir~…ĺikisi nad…ôbuŇčan nu por~…ĺand a pur~…ĺus…ô atu *ussia maŇčr~…ĺaj mip…ôn…ô ¶ tu tinsukiw, nika i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku sinku nu por~…ĺand a tad…ômaw misuajaw tu tinsukiw. i-su Ē~ ° por~…ĺand ni sikian tu aadińßan itini i kanatar~…ĺ mam…ôr~…ĺawan nu katuudaj nu siŇčaŇčanaj, itini i suotu warsaw idawku nu kitakitaj a sajawaj nu baju a sinbuŇč nipatid…ôŇč a puowkun . itini i tusa (**) a s…ô ¶i r~…ĺima a bataan (**) a zidaj, itini i kun ¶…ôn anikuwanan, sifu misuajaw tu nar~…ĺimaan ansaŇčaan anipikawan misaadidi Ē~ °a ¶a Ē~ °, u sibuŇč ńßantu mar~…ĺa pakunida sananaj a sasakamu…ôn nu kakawaw. katukuńß tu sabaw tu tusa a s…ô ¶i, por~…ĺand anipatid…ôŇčan a ka ¶udu nu siŇčbuŇč ka Ňčada ńßan nu katuudaj, sakatin…ôŇčan u " misakainai Ē~ ° tu kur~…ĺit atu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kur~…ĺit, ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn nuńß…ôni ku amisaj a nar~…ĺimaan a dadan".
S.FORM: Poland u Poland sa i labu nu Europe, itiza i 52 00 N, 20 00 E. u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa 312,685 km2. u ahebal nu lala'ay sa 304,255 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa 8,430 km2. hamin nu tademaw sa 38,523,261. kakalukan umah sa 48.20%, kilakilangan umah sa 30.60%, zumaay henay umah sa 21.20%. tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Warsaw . kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 3 bulad 5 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Andrzej Duda, micakat a demiad sa i 2015 a mihca 8 bulad 6 demiad. likisi Poland a niyaduan idawtu ku maluayaway a tademaw tayda itida mueneng. nika, aydahay a Poland a binacadan u kakawsan nuheni sa namakayda i siyun nu ayawan pitu a lasubu nuitidaay a tademaw ci Sise-la a tademaw. 2003ŚĻī4śúą, . tusa a malebut idaw ku tulu (2003) a mihcaan sepatay a bulad, India Pakistan nina tatusaay a kanatal masasakamu patahekal tuni ka lingatu ani kasa kamuan , sabaw tu cacay a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku lima a demiad pasaluimengen nuheni mikuwan tuni kalpacaw. siwa a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku enem (966) a mihcaan Maseke ise milayap tu kilisetukiw (tinsukiw) a kiwkay, u Poland mala kilisetu a sinciaan. nina aydaay a Poland katukuh aydaay a Ayelan palecaden nu kitakit a tinsukiw a kilac nu satalakaway a kanatal. sabaw tu tusa a se-ci malingatu, itepalay nu Sen-cen Roma ti-kuo anika icelang, Poland wan-kuo ahican caay piales tu Cuo-o Europe a lala' kiya haw, pasaida midiput tu Tun-o Euripe adidiay a Luo-se kunkuo , sisa masasu ada'tu micapi tu walu a lasubu a mihcaan itida i Tun-o Europe ani kasasuadaan. cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu a seci nu cuoye Mongolia pasaida i nutipan midebung tu Poland , Mongolia di-kuo debunga nuheni ku Cuo-ya Asia a kanatal atu Luo-se kun-kuo nikudan debungen nuheni ku Poland . , nika uyniyan u Mongolia itini i Europe a kitidaan misa ahebal tu tanengay a kitidaan, Leakenika malepacaw henay Poland atu tiwdun' maka subauay a mapulungay masakaputay a hitay hiyan nu Mongolia ahitay mamim apatayan. 1260ŚĻīšĽ£‚ÄĒ1280 . cacay a malebut tusa a lasubu enem a bataan (1260) a mihcaan - cacay a malebut tusa a lasubu walu a bataan (1280) a mihcaan demecen naca nu sasepatay a kanatal nu Cincen a kanatal misawacu, sisa nai'satu ku laheci nu Poland . 14šłĖÁīÄ, . cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat (14) saci, Poland atu Sensnluomadikuo alaw masasu kapah tu. nika Poland haymaw satu miliyas tu Cuo-o Europe , malatatengaay tu nu Tuo-o Europe a kanatal. 13ÔĹě14 . cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu (13)- cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat (14) a seci Poland atu biyaw a kanatal Litaw-wan-ta-kun-kuo amelik patiden tu masakaputay a kanatal, nina tusaay a kanatal sawsawni itini i hunse malalaluma'an. sadikuday satu Poland Lithuania demecen nuheni ku masasuaday nu Cincehan kanatal. miliyas atu Mongolia a tademaw nika sasungaay, alan nuhani ku Mumkutadan a tademaw mala O-lu Europe a satabakiya nu kanatal. cacay a bataan idaw ku enem katukuh katukuh tu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu a seci, nina tatusaay a kanatal palacacayen nu heni tu Poland Lithuania a kanatal, sisa nikaydaan nuheni makaala tu tusa a lasubu a mihcaan ku sakapahay satalakaway a zutay, milihida tu waliyan ni palekalan a E'luosesahun kanatal kinapina a malepacaw. atu Ottoman kanatal a nikalepacawan itinisatu Poland Lithuania mala atu Spain a kanatal Sensnluomadikuo , Ottoman kanatal, malecad atu Europe nu sepatay a saicelangay nu kanatal. cacay a bataan idaw ku walu nikudan a seci, Poland Lithuania pulu nu kanatal kalamkam a malawcu, itini i Sensnluomadikuo a kanatal a Awtili a kanatal, Puluse wankuo atu Poland nu ada' nuheni tu Russia kanatal nu tuluway a kanatal kina tulu kunuheni mibenis sisa malawpes satu kiya kanatal . namakayda malingatu nu tusaay a lasubu a mihcaan Cuo-Poland haymaw sa malawpes, haymaw satu liyawliyawsa a laecus. cacay a malebut enem a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku tulu (1683) a mihcaan, Poland kuowan ladayen nuheni ku hitay midebung amilepacaw tu Awtili nu Tueci a hitay, midiput tu O-cuo Europe anikakapah, pangangan han tu Wiyena ani kalepacaw han. cacay a bataan idaw ku siwa a seci, ci Napoleon ese mademec nikalepacaw satu, Poland nu hatidaay tu a lala' nu Russia kanatal Sahun a lala, nika Russia a kanatal kina cacayan a bataan a bulad a malepacaw. Poland itinitu i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku walu (1918 ) a mihcaan cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay a bulad misiteked tu kunuheni, patideng tu pulung nu kanatal, isulit nu likisi Poland u sakatusa a pulung nu kanatal. sakaudip cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku siwa a mihcaan (1989) nu nikudan, Poland nu Soviet lekec a awayway nu kiyaku a sakaudip pasaida i iciba nunipi sumad, GDP itini i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan idaw ku tulu (1993) a mihcaan katukuh tu tusa a malebut (2000) a mihcaan macunus kunika tanayuan mucelak. nika katukuh tu tusa a malebut idaw ku cacay (2001) a mihcaan kanatal adidi kumi cakaya tu cancanan mawada' atu kitakit nu sakaudip cacelakan mahaymaw ku kangdahan, Poland nu sakaudip anika cunus nikatanayu haymaw satu caaycelak. milihida satu Europe a malasacabayay , sakaudip nuheni kalamkam satu mucelak a kapah. Poland nami siteked satu, namakay i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu siwa a bataan (1990) a mihcaan mapalekal masumad, micidak i tusa a bataan idaw ku cacay (21) a saci nuayawan nu pina a mihcaan, Poland itini i Europe sakae'timan han kaadihan tu nu katuuday, sisa alaw a mala Europe a malasacabayay un sakalalima a sakasiidaay. sasinguan nu Poland Poland 87.5 a kilac a tademaw u tinsukiw ku yadahay, duma satu nu lima a kilacan (5%) a tademaw u Orthodox a kiwkay atu kilisetu a baluhay nu kiwkayan. ayda han adiditu ku mitesekay tu tinsukiw a lalay nu lisin. amica kunisulitan tu ilikisi nadebungan nu Poland a Puluse atu Russia manglay mipenec tu tinsukiw, nika icelang ku sinku nu Poland a tademaw misuayaw tu tinsukiw. i-su' Poland ni sikian tu aadihan itini i kanatal mamelawan nu katuuday nu singanganay, itini i suotu Warsaw idawku nu kitakitay a sayaway nu bayu a sinbung nipatideng a puowkun . itini i tusa (20) a seci lima a bataan (50) a ziday, itini i kuncen anikuwanan, sifu misuayaw tu nalimaan ansangaan anipikawan misaadidi'aca', u sibung hantu mala pakunida sananay a sasakamuen nu kakawaw. katukuh tu sabaw tu tusa a seci, Poland anipatidengan a kacudu nu singbung ka ngada han nu katuuday, sakatinengan u " misakainai' tu kulit atu micidekay a kulit, alesen nuheni ku amisay a nalimaan a dadan".
